creator: walterhurry@gmail.com
text:
emulators/virtualbox-ose-additions will not compile. The error message is:

kBuild: Installing VBoxService => /usr/ports/emulators/virtualbox-ose-additions/work/VirtualBox-4.2.18/out/freebsd.amd64/release/bin/additions/VBoxService
/usr/bin/ld: cannot find -lsupc++
